#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class PersonMapper
{
    public partial global::Demo.PersonDto ToDto(global::Demo.Person p)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(p);
        return new global::Demo.PersonDto
        {
            Age = p.Age,
            Name = p.Name,
        };
    }
}
